query: Crime and Punishment page count English translation
answer: The English translation of "Crime and Punishment" by Fyodor Dostoyevsky has a page count of 624 pages in the Liveright edition published on January 15, 2019. Other editions include 565 pages by Vintage and 608 pages by Penguin Classics.
